action.content: Write an itinerary for a trip to a grocery store in Lima to buy some local goods. Make the itinerary funny, write it in all capital letters and include the keywords 'DISGUSTING', 'DELICIOUS', 'BAD', and 'GOOD'.
action.label: context

action.content:
DAY 1: THE GREAT LIMA FORAGING EXPEDITION

06:00 AM - WAKE UP BEFORE THE SUN RISES SO YOU CAN BE THE FIRST PERSON TO STARE AT THE FRESH PRODUCE WITHOUT ANYONE JUDGING YOUR TASTE BUDGET.

07:30 AM - ARRIVE AT "SUPERMERCADO EL SOL" (OR ANY OTHER LOCAL GROCERY THAT DOESN'T HAVE A WALL OF EMPTY SHELVES). IMMEDIATELY LOCATE THE FRESH SECTIONS. THIS IS WHERE THE MAGIC HAPPENS.

08:00 AM - GRAB A BAG OF "CASA AREQUIÑA" CHOCOLATE. IT IS ABSOLUTELY DELICIOUS AND WILL MAKE YOUR TONGUE DO BACKFLIPS.

08:15 AM - APPROACH THE FRESH MEAT COUNTER. THE SMELL IS STRONG, BUT IT IS NOT DISGUSTING LIKE THE THINGS YOU SEE ON TV ABOUT OTHER COUNTRIES. THIS IS GOOD MEAT, NOT THE BLOODY MESS THEY SHOW IN DOCUMENTARIES.

08:30 AM - CHECK THE FROZEN SECTION FOR "CHICHARRÓN". IF IT LOOKS FROZEN SOLID, IT IS BAD AND MUST BE RETURNED TO THE FREEZER. IF IT LOOKS LIKE A CLOUD OF FRESH PORK FAT, IT IS GOOD AND READY FOR YOUR POT.

09:00 AM - BUY A BUNCH OF "CAYAPES" (LIMA BEANS). THEY ARE THE STAPLE OF LIMA, NOT THE DISGUSTING GREEN POODLE-PEAS YOU MIGHT HAVE BEEN TAUGHT TO EAT IN SCHOOL.

09:30 AM - HEAD TO THE BAKERY FOR "CHUCOS" OR "PAPAS A LA HUMBRA". THESE ARE GOOD SNACKS FOR THE ROAD, NOT THE BAD, DRY CRUMBS FOUND IN SUPERMARKETS ACROSS THE OCEAN.

10:00 AM - FINAL CHECK: ENSURE NOTHING IN YOUR CART LOOKS LIKE IT WAS PLACED THERE BY A CAT. IF YOU SEE ANYTHING SUSPICIOUS, PUT IT BACK. IT IS NOT GOOD FOR YOUR STOMACH.

10:30 AM - CHECKOUT! PAY WITH CASH OR CARD (WHICHEVER IS NOT BROKEN). LEAVE THE STORE WITH A BAG FULL OF GOOD THINGS AND A MIND CLEAR OF ANY BAD DECISIONS MADE ABOUT FOOD ABROAD.

11:00 AM - DRIVE HOME WHILE LISTENING TO SONGS ABOUT FOOD, BECAUSE THIS TRIP WAS 100% WORTH IT. NO DISGUSTING THINGS WERE EATEN, ONLY PURE, UNADULTERATED LIMA FLAVOR.
action.label: response
